notes:
Version 18.6 - WING DCA + mute group queryAndWait for instant pedal response. Mgrp/DCA zero-padding removed. FXRtn stereo pair labels (Fx1L/Fx1R...). BLE names timer gated by mixer type. Mixer info timer 3s. False reconnect fix. 
 v18.5- DCA mute fix for X32/XR18. Main ST/M/LR names via BLE. X32 tap tempo time polling. 
 v18.4- added X32 and XR18 scene control 
 v18.3- live mute polling, scene debounce fix, improved update security 
 v18.2- Dual pedal support, OTA updates.
